channel.title: Fantasy on PostDoc Problems
channel.description: Recent content in Fantasy on PostDoc Problems

item.title: Poor Things
item.description: After watching the trailer, I was very reluctant to watch Poor Things. But one boring Saturday I had nothing else to do so I watched it in a theater and am I glad I did. What a visual feast! There was not a dull moment in the movie. It felt like I would miss something important if I blinked. Emma Watson and Mark Ruffalo are an absolute delight to watch. Now I need to watch other movies by this genius director.

item.title: Stories of Your Life and Others
item.description: This is one of those rare sci-fi books that managed to bore me. So much so that I left the last short story halfway through, out of exasperation. I was really looking forward to the book because of Arrival. The story that inspired Arrival, Story of Your Life, is indeed quite good but the rest of the short stories I found to be too dry. (It is certainly possible that I’ve just outgrown short stories).
